info.title: Sim API v2 — Logs
info.description: Version 2 of the Sim API for workflow execution logs. v2 standardizes every response on a single envelope: a single resource returns `{ data }`, a list returns `{ data, nextCursor }`, and an error returns `{ error: { code, message, details? } }`. Lists use opaque cursor pagination (`limit` + `cursor` in, `nextCursor` out). Rate-limit state is carried in the `X-RateLimit-*` response headers rather than the body. Authenticate every request with the `X-API-Key` header.

tags.name: Logs
tags.description: Query workflow execution logs, retrieve a single log entry, and fetch the full execution state snapshot for a run.

get.description: List workflow execution logs for a workspace with filtering and opaque cursor pagination. Returns `{ data, nextCursor }`. By default (`details=basic`) each entry contains summary fields only; pass `details=full` to include the per-execution `workflow` summary, and additionally `includeFinalOutput=true` / `includeTraceSpans=true` to materialize `finalOutput` / `traceSpans` on each entry.

parameters.name: workflowIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of workflow IDs to filter by. Only logs from these workflows are returned.

parameters.name: folderIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of folder IDs. Returns logs for all workflows within these folders.

parameters.name: triggers
parameters.description: Comma-separated trigger types to filter by (e.g. api, webhook, schedule, manual, chat).

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Filter logs by severity level. info for successful executions, error for failed ones.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Only return logs started at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Only return logs started at or before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

parameters.name: executionId
parameters.description: Filter by an exact execution ID. Useful for looking up a specific run.

parameters.name: minDurationMs
parameters.description: Only return logs where total execution duration was at least this many milliseconds.

parameters.name: maxDurationMs
parameters.description: Only return logs where total execution duration was at most this many milliseconds.

parameters.name: minCost
parameters.description: Only return logs where execution cost was at least this amount in USD.

parameters.name: maxCost
parameters.description: Only return logs where execution cost was at most this amount in USD.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Filter by the AI model used during execution (e.g., gpt-4o, claude-sonnet-4-20250514).

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Response detail level. basic returns summary fields only. full additionally includes the per-entry workflow summary and enables the includeFinalOutput / includeTraceSpans materialization flags.

parameters.name: includeTraceSpans
parameters.description: When true, includes block-level execution trace spans on each entry. Only applies when details=full.

parameters.name: includeFinalOutput
parameters.description: When true, includes the workflow's final output on each entry. Only applies when details=full.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of log entries to return per page. Values are clamped to the range 1–1000.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned from a previous request's nextCursor field. Omit to fetch the first page.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order by execution start time. desc returns newest first.

200.description: A page of execution logs matching the filter criteria.

data.description: Log entries for the current page.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page. null when there are no more results.

get.description: Retrieve a single log entry by its ID, including the workflow metadata captured at execution time, the materialized execution data, and the cost summary. Returns `{ data }`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the log entry.

200.description: The requested log entry with full execution data and cost summary.

workflow.name: Customer Support Agent
workflow.description: Routes incoming support tickets and drafts responses

get.description: Retrieve the full execution state snapshot for a run: the workflow state captured at execution time plus execution metadata (trigger, timing, and cost). Returns `{ data }`.

parameters.name: executionId
parameters.description: The unique execution identifier.

200.description: The full execution state snapshot with workflow state and metadata.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Your Sim API key (personal or workspace). Generate one from the Sim dashboard under Settings > API Keys.

WorkspaceId.name: workspaceId
WorkspaceId.description: The unique identifier of the workspace whose logs to query.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed in the current rate-limit window.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Number of requests remaining in the current rate-limit window.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the current rate-limit window resets.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

Cost.description: Aggregate execution cost in USD. null when no cost was recorded for the run.

total.description: Total cost of the execution in USD.

LogWorkflowSummary.description: Workflow summary captured at execution time. Present on a list entry only when details=full.

id.description: The workflow's identifier. null if the log is not associated with a workflow.

name.description: Workflow name. Falls back to "Deleted Workflow" when the workflow no longer exists.

description.description: Workflow description, or null if none was set.
description.example: Routes incoming support tickets and drafts responses

deleted.description: Whether the workflow has since been deleted.

LogWorkflowDetail.description: Full workflow metadata captured at execution time.

id.description: The workflow's identifier. null if the log is not associated with a workflow.

name.description: Workflow name. Falls back to "Deleted Workflow" when the workflow no longer exists.

description.description: Workflow description, or null if none was set.
description.example: Routes incoming support tickets and drafts responses

folderId.description: The folder the workflow belongs to. null if at the workspace root or the workflow is gone.

userId.description: The user that owns the workflow. null if the workflow is gone.

workspaceId.description: The workspace the workflow belongs to. null if the workflow is gone.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workflow was created. null if the workflow is gone.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workflow was last modified. null if the workflow is gone.

deleted.description: Whether the workflow has since been deleted.

LogListItem.description: Summary of a single workflow execution log entry returned by the list endpoint.

workflowId.description: The workflow that was executed. null if the log is not associated with a workflow.

executionId.description: Unique execution identifier for this run.

deploymentVersionId.description: The deployment version that produced this run. null for runs not tied to a deployment.

level.description: Log severity. info for successful executions, error for failures.

trigger.description: How the execution was triggered (e.g., api, webhook, schedule, manual, chat).

endedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when execution completed. null if the run has not finished.

totalDurationMs.description: Total execution duration in milliseconds. null if the run has not finished.

files.description: Attachment metadata for files produced during the run. null when the run produced no files.

workflow.description: Workflow summary. Present only when details=full.

finalOutput.description: The workflow's final output. The shape depends on the workflow. Present only when details=full and includeFinalOutput=true.

traceSpans.description: Block-level execution trace spans with timing, inputs, and outputs. Present only when details=full and includeTraceSpans=true.

LogDetail.description: Detailed log entry with full workflow metadata, materialized execution data, and cost summary.

workflowId.description: The workflow that was executed. null if the log is not associated with a workflow.

executionId.description: Unique execution identifier for this run.

level.description: Log severity. info for successful executions, error for failures.

trigger.description: How the execution was triggered (e.g., api, webhook, schedule, manual, chat).

endedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when execution completed. null if the run has not finished.

totalDurationMs.description: Total execution duration in milliseconds. null if the run has not finished.

files.description: Attachment metadata for files produced during the run. null when the run produced no files.

executionData.description: Materialized execution trace for this run (block states, trace spans, and final output). Large blobs stored externally are resolved inline.

traceSpans.description: Block-level execution traces with timing, inputs, and outputs.

finalOutput.description: The workflow's final output after all blocks completed.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the log entry was recorded.

Execution.description: Full execution state snapshot: the workflow state at execution time plus execution metadata.

executionId.description: The unique identifier for this execution.

workflowId.description: The workflow that was executed. null if the log is not associated with a workflow.

workflowState.description: Snapshot of the workflow configuration at the time of execution.

blocks.description: Map of block IDs to their configuration and state during execution.

edges.description: Connections between blocks defining the execution flow.

loops.description: Loop configurations defining iterative execution patterns.

executionMetadata.description: Metadata about the execution including trigger, timing, and cost.

trigger.description: How the execution was triggered (e.g., api, webhook, schedule, manual, chat).

endedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when execution completed. null if the run has not finished.

totalDurationMs.description: Total execution duration in milliseconds. null if the run has not finished.

code.description: Machine-readable error code (e.g., BAD_REQUEST, UNAUTHORIZED, FORBIDDEN, NOT_FOUND, RATE_LIMITED, INTERNAL_ERROR).

details.description: Optional structured details about the error (e.g., field-level validation issues or rate-limit reset info). Present only on some errors.

BadRequest.description: Invalid request parameters. Inspect error.details for field-level validation issues.

Unauthorized.description: Invalid or missing API key. Ensure the X-API-Key header is set with a valid key.

Forbidden.description: The API key is authenticated but not authorized for the requested workspace.

error.message: API key is not authorized for this workspace

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found. An authorization failure on a single resource is also reported as 404 so resource existence is not leaked.

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded. Wait for the duration in the Retry-After header before retrying.

InternalError.description: An unexpected error occurred while processing the request.
